details: Change engine oil and filter. Check Intelligent Oil-Life Monitor status.
Rotate tires to ensure even wear and prolong tire life.
Inspect brake pads, rotors, and fluid levels. Replace if necessary.
Replace the cabin air filter to maintain air quality inside the vehicle.
Replace engine air filter to maintain optimal fuel efficiency and engine performance.
Replace spark plugs to ensure smooth engine operation and prevent misfires.
Flush and replace transmission fluid for long-term transmission health.
applicable_models: All Ford Models with Automatic Transmission

details: Flush and replace engine coolant to prevent overheating and corrosion.
Inspect the specialized cooling system for the high-voltage battery pack.
3-year/36,000-mile Bumper-to-Bumper Warranty and 5-year/60,000-mile Powertrain Warranty.
8-year/100,000-mile warranty for high-voltage battery and associated components.
Replace the 12V lead-acid battery to ensure reliable starting and accessory power. Test charging system.
Inspect and replace front and rear (if equipped) wiper blades for optimal visibility during rain or snow.
Change the rear and/or front differential fluid to ensure long component life and smooth power delivery.
Inspect the timing belt for wear, cracking, or glazing. Replace if necessary to prevent catastrophic engine damage.
Drain and replace brake fluid to remove moisture and prevent internal corrosion of the braking system.
Flush the cooling system and replace the coolant to ensure proper engine temperature regulation.
Adjust the angles of the wheels to the manufacturer's specifications to ensure even tire wear and proper handling.
Replace the drive belt that powers accessories like the alternator, power steering, and AC compressor.
Remove corrosion from battery terminals and apply protective spray to ensure reliable electrical connections.
Refill the DEF tank to ensure the selective catalytic reduction (SCR) system can properly reduce NOx emissions.
Replace the primary and secondary fuel filters to protect the high-pressure fuel system from contaminants and water.
Replace transmission fluid and filter. Severe duty includes frequent towing, hauling, or off-road use.
